subject: [RFC PATCH 04/45] mm: mm_init: fix zone assignment for pages in unavailable ranges

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch fixes a problem in the Linux kernel where pages in memory holes between memblock regions were being assigned to the wrong zone, leading to potential accounting confusion or crashes. The fix involves looking up the correct zone for each page in the hole during initialization, which has no performance impact since it only runs once at boot time.
